branch.language: Pati-Salam blocks, not raw SO(10) tensor components
branch.name: CMSGUT-like 210+126+overline126+10
branch.reason: literature-compatible source-sector fallback with a 126bar_H post-B-L source for P_nu^c

conventions_to_resolve.status: unresolved; must be mapped to the chosen BMSV/Aulakh-style table
conventions_to_resolve.why_it_matters: F-term cubic coefficients and mass matrices are convention-sensitive.

conventions_to_resolve.status: stage-1 convention: record |sigma|=|bar_sigma| and allow sigma=bar_sigma after gauge fixing
conventions_to_resolve.why_it_matters: D-flatness fixes magnitudes, while the relative phase is a gauge/source convention.
The literature cubic P3(x;xi)=0 has multiple equivalent definitions.
Acceptance depends on reproducing enhanced-symmetry limits, not on a custom cubic.

conventions_to_resolve.status: source-named SU(5), flipped SU(5), and G_LR points validated; no full-Pati-Salam point claimed
conventions_to_resolve.why_it_matters: SU(5), flipped SU(5), and left-right/Pati-Salam-related limits are the stage-1 validation anchors.

conventions_to_resolve.status: conventions-diff file created; unresolved until dual-source comparison is filled
conventions_to_resolve.why_it_matters: Historical spectrum tables differ by signs and normalizations.

d_flatness_contract.claim_boundary: recorded convention only; no solved F/D-flat vacuum claimed
d_flatness_contract.stage1_gauge_choice: sigma = bar_sigma may be used after fixing the conjugate source phase

literature_convention_map.abmsv_2003_sign_note: The 2003 short note writes omega with the opposite sign; p and a formulas match after omega_ABMSV=-omega_AG.

crosscheck_source.scope: minimal SUSY SO(10) setup and compact cubic/vev summary

primary_source.scope: Pati-Salam decomposition, vev dictionary, F-term equations, cubic, spectra/couplings

literature_special_point_contract.warning: Primary source labels xi=3 as G_LR, not full Pati-Salam SU(4)_C x SU(2)_L x SU(2)_R.

literature_special_point_contract.stage1_status: not claimed: primary source names xi=3 as G_LR rather than full Pati-Salam
